review_notes: 640x360 native; geometry traced from blockout (logical/3, horizon y=120); palette-clean via check-palette.ts; inspected composite at 3x and 8x crops. Walls/ceiling/floor shell, wainscot, rear shelves+bottles, fluorescent tube+splashback, corridor+entrance recesses, clock face, notice board, pennant (red accent), water stain, plaster patch, 5 pendants w/ ceiling halos, table shadows. Opaque.
